prose: Frontier orbital calculation on O₂ (molecular oxygen, triplet ground state) using DFT at the B3LYP/def2-TZVP level (tier 'standard', PySCF UKS), gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 3. Geometry: user-supplied .xyz at /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/oxygen/oxygen.xyz (single-point; not re-optimized at this level). SCF converged in 7 cycles. No warnings reported. Integrity check: trustworthy = true, all checks passed. HOMO = −8.8739616 eV, LUMO = −3.5859031 eV, HOMO–LUMO gap = 5.2880586 eV. HOMO and HOMO−1 are degenerate (the two singly-occupied π*g orbitals of O₂'s ³Σ⁻g state), as expected. Koopmans vertical IP = 8.8739616 eV, vertical EA = 3.5859031 eV.
